name: Andoria
tagline: The Western Continent
description: Frozen fjords to the north, iron mountains to the south. The Godsvein Valley runs through the center like a wound that never closed. Andoria's people are stubborn, insular, and built to endure.

name: Kalendra
tagline: The Central Continent
description: A thousand lakes, a fertile crescent, and a desert that swallowed an empire. Kalendra was the heart of the old world. The Sundering broke it worse than anywhere else and the scars are still visible.

name: Morgard
tagline: The Eastern Continent
description: The Everwood. The Howling Plains. A coastline of drowned ruins and storms that never quit. Morgard keeps to itself and outsiders learn quickly not to press the point.

name: Kael'Doran
tagline: The Ember Gate
description: A city on blackite cliffs built by refugees of the fallen Thal Empire. Three centuries of stubbornness carved into stone. Smoke rises from the forge quarter. The wards are failing and no one wants to talk about it.

name: Frozen Fjords
tagline: Ice and silence at the top of the world
description: The northernmost reaches of Andoria where the sea cuts deep channels into frozen rock. Few settlements survive here. Those that do don't talk much about what lives in the water.

name: Northern Forests
tagline: Dense woodland below the frost line

name: Eastern Dry Lands
tagline: Arid badlands east of the valley

name: Godsvein Valley
tagline: The heart of Andoria
description: A massive river valley that splits Andoria nearly in half. Rich farmland on the banks, old mines in the cliffsides. The name comes from a belief that the river carries trace amounts of divine ore downstream.

name: Ironspine Mountains
tagline: A spine of dark stone splitting the continent

name: Southern Peninsula
tagline: Where the land gives way to open sea

name: The Thousand Lakes
tagline: A maze of freshwater and marshland

name: The Fertile Crescent
tagline: Breadbasket of the central continent

name: The Great Erg Desert
tagline: Endless dunes where nothing grows
description: A desert that has been expanding for centuries. Old maps show cities beneath the sand. No one has confirmed what's down there because expeditions don't come back.

name: Skyreach Mountains
tagline: Peaks that scrape the heavens

name: The Burning Valleys
tagline: Volcanic rifts that never cool

name: The Sunken Gulf
tagline: A drowned coast of flooded ruins

name: Jade Narrows Basin
tagline: Sheltered waters between the cliffs

name: Stormbreak Island
tagline: Battered by storms year-round

name: Howling Plains
tagline: Flat grassland where the wind never stops

name: The Everwood
tagline: An ancient forest that does not sleep
description: Trees older than any recorded history. The canopy is so thick that the forest floor exists in permanent twilight. Locals say the trees move when you're not looking.

name: Worldedge Mountains
tagline: The eastern rim of the known world

name: Southern Grasslands
tagline: Rolling plains stretching to the horizon

name: Subantarctic Forests
tagline: Cold woodland at the edge of ice

name: Southern Ice Shield
tagline: The frozen south
